title: pt-BR is the default operational language for HermesOps
summary: HermesOps should use Brazilian Portuguese for human-facing explanations, reports, KCS, macros and operational guidance while preserving technical syntax, commands, paths, function names and original error messages.
facts: pt-BR is the preferred operational language.
Technical syntax must not be translated.
Original error messages must be preserved and explained in Portuguese.
inferences: CLI messages, prompts, KCS and macros should have pt-BR variants.
rollback: Revert localization files and memory item if policy changes.
